title.rendered: Going for Gold – Help us in the British Travel Awards 2022

content.rendered:
Did you know, that Travel FX currently hold the silver award for best foreign exchange/ Holiday Money Retailer and we owe it all to you and all our amazing customers?  The British Travel awards are voted for by consumers and the public, so your votes in 2019/2020 helped us achieve this. We were ecstatic with our win, and we want to accomplish the same or better in 2022.

The Challenge

We are up against the biggest companies in the industry and face the challenge that many smaller retailers and online companies face, that we just don’t have the exposure of shops on every high street or the number of sales that the bigger players have.

The current gold award holder The Post Office is certainly the biggest in the industry and has dominated the voting over the past years, but our commitment to the best prices on currencies and 5-star excellent service is incomparable to theirs and makes us proud competitors and very worthy contenders.

Your Support

We hope that with the support of our valued customers old and new, and the general public, we can be real contenders with the national companies. We pride ourselves on our commitment to low prices and excellence in everything we do.

In the last year, we have launched our new website and new services and we are continuously striving to improve service and client satisfaction which is recognised through the stunning reviews our clients submit to Google and Trustpilot.  And while winning awards is not our primary objective it is a tremendous boost and rewards our tremendous team.

You can win too!

Everyone who takes the trouble to vote in the 2022 British Travel Awards is entered into a free prize draw, with some great prizes up for grabs, including luxury stays, flights, holiday vouchers and much more.  See the full list of prizes below.

So, if you think we deserve to win (and if you want to have the chance to win great prizes too) then please vote for us.

 The Prizes

Here are the prizes which can be won:

  • An all-inclusive Rhine or Danube seven-night cruise. Worth: up to £5,000.
  • Ionian & Aegean Holidays – Seven-night holiday for two – including flights and car hire Worth: £5,000
  •  5-day escorted Bruges: ‘Venice of the North’ coach tour by Shearings, the iconic escorted coach tours company, for two people to Belgium. Worth: £878
  • A one-weeks car rental from Avis. Worth: around £500
  •  £500 Holiday Voucher from Silver Travel Advisor
  • £2,000 voucher for use with Solmar Villas for a booking from their “exclusive villas” range only.
  • 2-night stay at The Cornwall Hotel & Spa. Worth: £335
  • 5-Day holiday for 2 people at one of the twenty-one UK Leisureplex Hotels, includes UK coach travel with local joining point, half-board and two full-day excursions.
  • Silversea’s beautiful “celebration” hamper. Worth £250
  • Enjoy a week’s parking with APH and a night’s stay on-airport before your flight. Worth: £300
  • Cornish Gems – Win a 3-night stay, for four people, at Whipsy, Porth in an outstanding coastal apartment with Cornish Gems.
  • A two-night stay at one of many charming UK holiday homes with Host & Stay, up to the value of £1,000.
  • James Villa Holidays – £2,000 gift card to be used on one of their 3000 villas in 60 locations.
  •  £750 Luxury Coastal holiday voucher to be used on any holiday arriving on or before 31 December 2023.
  • £250 in vouchers for Railway Touring.
  • £500 Sykes Holiday Cottages holiday voucher
  • Win a 7-night stay in a Deluxe Lodge accommodating four people with Verdant Leisure.
  • £250 “One 4 All” high street voucher to spend in a variety of shops across most high streets.
  • P & O Ferries – various crossings and mini cruises.
  • Blue Bay Travel – 5* Thailand – 7 nights accommodation only.
  • Riviera Travel – a one-week Dalmation Coast cruise, including flights.
  • Newmarket Holidays – a 6-night Kruger National Park safari

Thanks in advance! (And good luck!)

Travel FX customers have always been so generous in taking your time to review our service, we are hoping that you’ll extend that generosity to voting for us in the BTA’s. The awards are decided purely on the public vote, we would be very grateful if you could spare a moment to vote for us.

Thanks, and good luck!

itemListElement.name: Going for Gold – Help us in the British Travel Awards 2022

@graph.name: Travel FX Blog
@graph.description: Travel money news and tips from Travel FX

@graph.name: Lucy Reed
@graph.description: Hi! I’m Lucy, as well as writing blog posts I lead Customer Experience and UX at Travel FX. With over 15 years’ experience in the foreign exchange industry, I specialise in helping UK travellers understand exchange rates, avoid unnecessary fees, and feel confident about their travel money before they fly. Having lived both in the UK and overseas, and travelled extensively over the years, I understand first-hand how important it is to get the details right when you’re planning a trip. From managing your travel budget to choosing the right foreign currency or travel money card, small decisions can make a big difference.
